bibliography.bibliomixed:

https://doi.org/10.3389/fpsyt.2023.1189231

Aster KGV, Castillo JRB, Cheng SR, Trillana JPL, Varlez YMB, Mercado JMT (2023) Sawsawan: explicating the culinary heritage significance of Philippine condiments using bibliometrics (1972–2018). J Ethnic Foods 10(1):1–15. https://doi.org/10.1186/s42779-023-00186-3
https://doi.org/10.1186/s42779-023-00186-3

Benard S, Manago B, Acosta Russian A, Cha Y (2023) Mapping the content of Asian stereotypes in the United States: intersections with ethnicity, gender, income, and birthplace. Soc Psychol Q 86(4):432–456. https://doi.org/10.1177/01902725221126188
https://doi.org/10.1177/01902725221126188

Cann V (2020) Negotiating identities: Being “boy,” being “Filipino,” being “other”. Boyhood Stud 13(1):23–42. https://doi.org/10.3167/bhs.2020.130103
https://doi.org/10.3167/bhs.2020.130103

https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/philippines/

https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijgfs.2022.100522
Galanti GA (2000) Filipino attitudes toward pain medication: a lesson in cross-cultural care. J Immigr Minor Health 10(6):551–558

Magat M (2020) Localizing the ‘ethnic:’ Balut-eating contests and identity performance among Filipino Americans. West Folk 79(1):105–126

Manielleas: 30 Superstitions Filipinos practice during funerals (2024).
http://www.manillenials.com/filipino-superstitions-funerals-pamahiin-sa-patay/

Moreno-Lacalle RC, Bangsal MR, Bay-Ya MRT, Erese KAR, Gabol LAP, Geronimo MM, Legiralde SBB, Lomandas MMA, Menzi MMR, Real CDL, Solis JMBF, Ufina KU, Lacanaria MGC (2023) Beliefs and practices on depression among selected Filipino indigenous peoples: a focused ethnography. J Trans Nurs 34(5):321–329. https://doi.org/10.1177/10436596231183183
https://doi.org/10.1177/10436596231183183

Parba J (2021) Teaching critical vocabulary to Filipino heritage language learners. Educ Sci 11:260 https://doi.org/10.3390/educsci11060260

http://www.commisceo-global.com/country-guides/phillippines-guide

https://philippines-events-culture.knoji.com/philippine-beliefs-on-pregnancy/
